actual_current_surface_status: exact negative boundary / exact tensor Schur A/B/C row feasibility blocked on current PR230 surface
conditional_surface_status: conditional-support if a future same-surface neutral scalar kernel basis, source/orthogonal projector, A/B/C row definitions, and certified exact tensor contraction are supplied
exact_next_action: Define a same-surface neutral scalar kernel basis and source/orthogonal projector, then emit A/B/C or precontracted matrix Schur rows from a certified exact tensor/PEPS contraction.  If that cannot be supplied, pivot to O_H/C_sH/C_HH pole rows, same-source W/Z response rows with g2 and identity authority, strict scalar-LSZ moment/threshold/FV authority, or a neutral-sector irreducibility certificate.

future_tensor_row_contract.comment: The source-only object can be simulated or tensorized in principle.
future_tensor_row_contract.required: PR230 source functional or finite tensor network for the source-only scalar marginal
same-surface neutral scalar kernel basis containing source and orthogonal directions
projector and normalization selecting the source block and orthogonal complement
definitions of A(q), B(q), C(q), or equivalent precontracted matrix Schur rows
contact/subtraction, threshold, FV/IR, and limiting-order conventions for row use at the pole
O_H/source-Higgs identity, same-source W/Z identity, or neutral irreducibility authority that makes the rows physical
actual exact tensor/PEPS contraction or certified numerical tensor contraction of the defined row network
reject H_unit, Ward, observed selectors, alpha/plaquette/u0, reduced pilots, unit c2/Z_match/kappa_s, and PSLQ selectors

parent_statuses.clean_source_higgs_math_selector: exact support / clean source-Higgs outside-math route selector; positive closure still open
parent_statuses.full_positive_closure_assembly_gate: open / full positive PR230 closure assembly gate not passed
parent_statuses.invariant_ring_oh_attempt: exact negative boundary / invariant-ring O_H certificate attempt blocked on current PR230 surface
parent_statuses.neutral_primitive_stretch: exact negative boundary / neutral-scalar primitive-cone stretch no-go on current PR230 surface
parent_statuses.retained_closure_route: open / retained closure not yet reached
parent_statuses.scalar_lsz_holonomic_attempt: exact negative boundary / scalar-LSZ holonomic exact-authority not derivable from current finite-shell PR230 data
parent_statuses.schur_absence_guard: bounded-support / Schur K-prime row absence guard; finite source-only rows rejected
parent_statuses.schur_candidate_extraction: exact negative boundary / Schur row candidate extraction from finite ladder support
parent_statuses.schur_compressed_bootstrap: exact negative boundary / Schur compressed-denominator row-bootstrap no-go
parent_statuses.schur_contract: open / Schur kernel row contract gate not passed; current rows absent
parent_statuses.schur_sufficiency: exact-support / Schur-complement K-prime sufficiency theorem; current rows absent
parent_statuses.source_functional_lsz_identifiability: exact negative boundary / source-functional LSZ identifiability theorem

proposal_allowed_reason: Exact tensor/PEPS contraction can evaluate a defined finite tensor network, but the current PR230 surface does not define the neutral scalar kernel basis, source/orthogonal partition, or A/B/C row operators.  The same source-only marginal is compatible with inequivalent Schur row definitions.

checks.interpretation: An exact source-only tensor marginal does not select the Schur source/orthogonal row partition.  Distinct A/B/C rows can share the same source marginal until the row network itself is defined.

strict_non_claims: does not produce Schur A/B/C rows
does not write a future Schur row file
does not claim retained or proposed_retained PR230 closure
does not use H_unit, Ward identity, observed targets, alpha_LM, plaquette, u0, reduced pilots, unit c2/Z_match/kappa_s, or PSLQ selectors
does not treat exact tensor/PEPS as authority before the row network is defined
